services.name: EruditePay Process
services.description: Submit a transaction hash for on-chain verification
services.llm_usage_prompt: To use EruditePay Process, call https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/pay/process with x402 payment of 0.01 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Submit a transaction hash for on-chain verification
services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call EruditePay Process
resp = requests.get("https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/pay/process")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 10000 USDC micro-units

services.name: EruditePay History
services.description: Paginated payment history for the merchant
services.llm_usage_prompt: To use EruditePay History, call https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/pay/history with x402 payment of 0.005 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Paginated payment history for the merchant

services.name: EruditePay BASE: Address
services.description: Recent activity summary for any Base address (last 1h)
services.llm_usage_prompt: To use EruditePay BASE: Address, call https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/base/monitor/address with x402 payment of 0.005 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Recent activity summary for any Base address (last 1h)
